creator: arcade@b1t.name
text:
Created attachment 234089
patch to 2.7.3

Hello.

Changelog:

https://help.resilio.com/hc/en-us/articles/206216855-Sync-2-x-change-log

2.7.3.1381

    Use sha-256 signed certificate for WebUI for new installations
    Add .icloud to default IgnoreList
    Deprecated: support for WindowsServers for Sync Home Free and Pro
    Fixed non-clickable "Can't download file" error
    Fixed improper reporting the error about missing access permissions
    Fixed false positive "No free space" error on WD NAS
    Fixed crashes on QNAP and Synology in some cases
    Fixed crash caused by mix of composed and decomposed symbols in filenames
    Fixed crash when syncing streams from NTFS formatted drive on macOS
    Fixed losing history log entries after update
    Fixed generating sample configuration file
    Fixed Finder Extensions getting enabled again after Sync restart on macOS
    Other core and UI fixes

Thanks in advance!
